ai_summary:
Account Overview: Total 7-day spend of Rs.9,200 is split across 6 campaigns that are actually running — the remaining 24 "active" campaigns have zero spend and should be paused to keep the account clean. No lead conversions were recorded this week, which is a critical gap: all running campaigns are awareness/engagement-focused with no active lead generation funnel.

Best Performing:
🟢 Rhythm Gurgaon | Awareness — Outstanding 13.33% CTR at just Rs.0.23 CPC and Rs.31 CPM. This is your most efficient campaign; the creative and audience are well-matched. Consider increasing budget.
🟢 Rhythm Corporate Ads Branding — 97K reach with 7.18% CTR at Rs.0.54 CPC. Strong brand visibility at low cost. Good for top-of-funnel.

Underperforming:
🔴 Rhythm | Lonavala | Weddings — Rs.700 spent for only 4,552 impressions. CPM of Rs.154 is 5–7x higher than other campaigns, suggesting the audience is too narrow or the creative is mismatched. Refresh the creative or broaden the audience.
🔴 SKY CLUB | GUR | June 2026 — Rs.778 spent for 137 clicks at Rs.5.68 CPC. CTR of 1.21% is borderline. For a restaurant/venue campaign this needs stronger visual creative and a tighter CTA.

3 Actions for This Week:
1. Launch a lead gen campaign immediately — Maple Lonavala Website Leads is getting 2,503 clicks but 0 conversions. Check if the landing page/lead form is broken; fix it before spending more.
2. Scale Kumarakom Weddings Awareness — Rs.2.22 CPM with 312K impressions is exceptional. Double the budget here; it's reaching a massive audience at almost no cost.
3. Pause all 24 zero-spend campaigns — They're cluttering your account. Archive old boosted posts that have ended so reporting stays clean.
